_readme: Render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Tracks the generic pipeline; pin a knob here only with a measured, dataset-specific reason.

notes.red_halo: the bright-star red halo is the Sigma-180-wide-open veiling-glare signature (R-G plateau +4..+5 counts r~6-38; absent on the same body at 50 mm f/4) — USER VERDICT: honest gear data, never de-fringe it in the render; the fix is acquisition (stop down)
notes.chroma_core: the generic k=4 was the user's pick on this set's k=0/2/4 ladder (neutral look); it does mute some real H-alpha colour on bright targets — re-ladder only with a hypothesis
